'''zhathugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nocency|nocency]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-th-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nocency|nocency]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhathugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæthigith|zhæthigith]] || [[word:zhæthigij|zhæthigij]] || [[word:zhæthigish|zhæthigish]] || [[word:zhæthigi|zhæthigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhathuthuguth|zhathuthuguth]] || [[word:zhathuthuguj|zhathuthuguj]] || [[word:zhathuthugush|zhathuthugush]] || [[word:zhathuthugu|zhathuthugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhathuguth|zhathuguth]] || [[word:zhathuguj|zhathuguj]] || [[word:zhathugush|zhathugush]] || [[word:zhathugu|zhathugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhathufguth|zhathufguth]] || [[word:zhathufguj|zhathufguj]] || [[word:zhathufgush|zhathufgush]] || [[word:zhathufguf|zhathufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhathuguthu|zhathuguthu]] || [[word:zhathuguju|zhathuguju]] || [[word:zhathugushu|zhathugushu]] || [[word:zhathuguku|zhathuguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhathuguth|zhathuguth]] || [[word:zhathuguj|zhathuguj]] || [[word:zhathugush|zhathugush]] || [[word:zhathugu|zhathugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhathuguthul|zhathuguthul]] || [[word:zhathugujul|zhathugujul]] || [[word:zhathugushul|zhathugushul]] || [[word:zhathugukul|zhathugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhathuguthuthu|zhathuguthuthu]] || [[word:zhathugujuju|zhathugujuju]] || [[word:zhathugushushu|zhathugushushu]] || [[word:zhathuguku|zhathuguku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhathuguthun|zhathuguthun]] || [[word:zhathugujun|zhathugujun]] || [[word:zhathugushun|zhathugushun]] || [[word:zhathugukun|zhathugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhathuguthuoro|zhathuguthuoro]] || [[word:zhathugujuoro|zhathugujuoro]] || [[word:zhathugushuoro|zhathugushuoro]] || [[word:zhathugukuoro|zhathugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
